## PROFESSIONAL PROFILE
Senior QA Engineer with 10+ years across HRIS/payroll, banking/mainframe (COBOL), and telecommunications. Delivers end‑to‑end quality through test strategy, manual/regression/system testing, and data validation with SQL. Experience includes PHP-based automation, performance/middleware testing, and structured release readiness in enterprise environments. ISTQB‑certified.

## WORK EXPERIENCE

### Senior QA Engineer | PayAsia by Deel
**January 2022 – April 2026** | Quezon City, Philippines

Scope: HRIS and payroll platform; multi‑module SaaS environment

- Translated business requirements into clear acceptance and regression test cases covering core HRIS/payroll workflows.
- Validated bug fixes and supported structured release cycles with defined entry/exit criteria and test evidence.
- Developed PHP automation scripts to strengthen regression coverage and reduce repetitive manual effort.
- Partnered with engineering and product to prioritise defects, align test scope with release goals, and ensure smooth hand‑offs.

### Software Test Analyst I | FIS Global
**June 2016 – January 2022** | [Location]

Scope: Banking/financial systems; mainframe and legacy components

- Performed usability, performance, reliability, scalability, and security testing for client‑priority releases.
- Authored test strategies and managed execution within agreed timelines, documenting risks and outcomes.
- Reported test progress, risks, and defect status to stakeholders during planning and execution.
- Mainframe & COBOL focus: tested mainframe‑based banking systems (payments/transactions); executed end‑to‑end validation of legacy components for accuracy, stability, and compliance.

### Software Engineering Analyst | Accenture
**May 2013 – April 2015** | [Location]

Scope: Telecommunications; 3‑tier web and backend systems

- Designed and prepared functional and performance test cases for telecom applications.
- Created and managed test data to enable reliable, repeatable testing across environments.
- Executed performance and middleware testing; contributed to system reliability assessments.
- Provided Tier‑1 support for HP ALM and LoadRunner; documented usage guides and troubleshooting steps.
